##RRUFFID=R130060
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Bi(VO_4_)
##LOCALITY=Ritter mine, Schneeberg District, Erzgebirge, Saxony, Germany
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=William W. Pinch
##DESCRIPTION=Greenish-yellow milky tetragonal crystals, associated with waylandite, bismutite, and clear crystal of dreyerite R140327
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130060
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 7.2953 b: 7.2953 c: 6.4595 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 343.78 crystal system: tetragonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
